subject: English
read_aloud: What sound does DINOSAUR start with? Ddd-inosaur...
correct_response: Amazing Jesse! Ddd for DINOSAUR! You heard that sound perfectly!
incorrect_response: Listen carefully: Ddd-inosaur. The very first sound is Ddd! Like in dog and dad!
hint: Say it slowly with me: Ddd-inosaur. What's that first sound? Ddd...

subject: English
correct_response: Amazing Jesse! KICK and STICK both end in ICK! They rhyme! Hi-YA!
incorrect_response: Listen: K-ICK, ST-ICK. They both end in the same sound: ICK! That means they rhyme!
hint: Say KICK. Now say STICK. Do they sound the same at the end?

subject: English
read_aloud: What's the first letter in REX? R-R-Rex...
correct_response: Amazing Jesse! R for REX! Rrrrr like a roaring dinosaur!
incorrect_response: Listen: Rrr-ex. The first sound is Rrr! R is for Rex!
hint: Say it slowly: Rrr-ex. What sound do you hear first?

subject: English
read_aloud: ROAR starts with the same sound as... RUN or CAT?
correct_response: Amazing Jesse! ROAR and RUN both start with Rrr! You've got great dinosaur ears!
incorrect_response: Let's listen: Rrr-oar, Rrr-un, C-at. ROAR and RUN both start with Rrr!
hint: Say ROAR slowly. Now say RUN. Now say CAT. Which one starts the same as ROAR?

subject: English
read_aloud: What rhymes with CHOP? Think of a karate chop! Does HOP or RUN rhyme with CHOP?
correct_response: Amazing Jesse! CHOP and HOP both end in OP! Great rhyming, karate star!
incorrect_response: Listen to the ending: CH-OP, H-OP. They both end in OP! HOP rhymes with CHOP!
hint: CHOP ends in OP. Which word also ends in OP? HOP or RUN?

subject: English
read_aloud: What sound does TEETH start with? Like big dinosaur teeth! Ttt-eeth...
correct_response: Amazing Jesse! Ttt for TEETH! Like the T in T-Rex!
incorrect_response: Listen: Ttt-eeth. The first sound is Ttt! Just like T-Rex starts with T!
hint: Ttt-eeth. Put your tongue behind your top teeth and say Ttt.

subject: English
read_aloud: KARATE starts with the same sound as... KITE or BALL?
correct_response: Amazing Jesse! KARATE and KITE both start with the Kkk sound! Well done!
incorrect_response: Listen carefully: Kkk-arate, Kkk-ite, B-all. KARATE and KITE both start with Kkk!
hint: Say KARATE. What's the first sound? Kkk. Now which starts the same: KITE or BALL?

subject: English
read_aloud: Does ROAR rhyme with SOAR? Like a dinosaur's ROAR and a pterodactyl can SOAR!
correct_response: Amazing Jesse! ROAR and SOAR rhyme! They both end in OAR!
incorrect_response: Listen to them: R-OAR, S-OAR. Same ending sound: OAR! They rhyme!
hint: ROAR... SOAR... do they sound the same at the end?

subject: English
read_aloud: What sound does STOMP start with? Sss-tomp, like a dinosaur stomping!
correct_response: Amazing Jesse! Sss for STOMP! Sss-tomp sss-tomp go the dinosaur feet!
incorrect_response: Listen: Sss-tomp. The very first sound is Sss, like a snake! Sssss!
hint: Sss-tomp. What's that first hissing sound? Like a snake: Sssss...

subject: English
read_aloud: What rhymes with PUNCH? Is it LUNCH or CAKE?
correct_response: Amazing Jesse! PUNCH and LUNCH rhyme! They both end in UNCH!
incorrect_response: P-UNCH and L-UNCH both end in UNCH! So LUNCH rhymes with PUNCH!
hint: PUNCH ends in UNCH. Which word ends the same way? Say them both!

subject: English
read_aloud: How many claps in DI-NO-SAUR? Clap for each part!
correct_response: Amazing Jesse! DI-NO-SAUR has 3 claps! You're a syllable superstar!
incorrect_response: Let's clap together! DI (clap) NO (clap) SAUR (clap). That's 3 claps!
hint: Clap with me: DI... NO... SAUR. How many claps was that?

subject: English
read_aloud: What sound does BELT start with? Like your karate belt! Bbb-elt...
correct_response: Amazing Jesse! Bbb for BELT! One day you'll earn a black belt!
incorrect_response: Listen: Bbb-elt. The first sound is Bbb! B is for Belt!
hint: Bbb-elt. Feel your lips pop together: Bbb...

subject: English
read_aloud: EGG starts with the same sound as... ELEPHANT or DOG?
correct_response: Amazing Jesse! EGG and ELEPHANT both start with Eee! Maybe an elephant hatched from that egg!
incorrect_response: Listen: Eee-gg, Eee-lephant, D-og. EGG and ELEPHANT both start with Eee!
hint: Say EGG. Now say ELEPHANT. Do they start the same? What about DOG?

subject: English
read_aloud: What rhymes with BONE? Like a dinosaur bone! Is it STONE or FISH?
correct_response: Amazing Jesse! BONE and STONE rhyme! Dinosaur bones can turn into stone!
incorrect_response: Listen: B-ONE, ST-ONE. They both end in ONE! STONE rhymes with BONE!
hint: BONE ends in ONE. Which word also ends in ONE? Say them out loud!

subject: English
read_aloud: How many claps in KA-RA-TE? Clap for each part!
correct_response: Amazing Jesse! KA-RA-TE has 3 claps! Hi-ya, you did it!
incorrect_response: Let's clap together! KA (clap) RA (clap) TE (clap). That's 3 claps!
hint: Clap with me: KA... RA... TE. Count your claps!
